text.title: AI Workload Cost Attribution Examples
text.summary: End-to-end worked example for ai-workload-cost-attribution showing inputs, rule application, and final artefact.

good.description: Tenants tagged at gateway. OpenAI usage API + DCGM exporter ingested daily. Pricing catalogue v2026-04. Monthly variance vs invoice 0.3%. UNATTRIBUTED 0.4% (root-caused to a deprecated internal cron).

bad.description: Tenants attributed by post-hoc log grep. No pricing catalogue versioning. Variance 18% (provider charged a deprecated model rate). UNATTRIBUTED 22% (the entire dev environment).
